mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 4% signals a weakening labor market that reduces consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising unemployment are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts above 1.4 million units signals a strengthening housing market that boosts consumer confidence and spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising housing starts are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production below 101 signals a weakening supply chain that reduces corporate profitability and investment, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with declining industrial production are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP above 2.7 billion signals a strengthening economy that boosts corporate profitability and investment, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising real GDP are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above 5.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses equity valuations and reduces corporate profitability, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising federal funds rate are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in initial jobless claims below 200,000 signals a strengthening labor market that reduces unemployment and boosts consumer spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with declining initial jobless claims are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real disposable personal income above 4.2 trillion signals a strengthening economy that boosts consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising real disposable personal income are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).
